from cadquery import Workplane

# Diamond engagement ring with pavé band
# Ring band dimensions
band_outer_radius = 10
band_inner_radius = 8.5
band_height = 2
band_width = band_outer_radius - band_inner_radius

# Create the main ring band
result = (
    Workplane("XY")
    .circle(band_outer_radius)
    .circle(band_inner_radius)
    .extrude(band_height)
)

# Add rounded edges to band
result = result.edges("|Z").fillet(0.3)

# Create prongs for center stone (4 prongs)
prong_height = 4
